data.description:
## What
Add a command that prints the resolved config values and WHICH layer each came from (CLI/env/project/user/default) — the ruff --show-settings / pip config debug pattern.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] rebar config (or --show-config) prints resolved values + source layer per key
- [ ] Wired across CLI; tests for output shape
Blocked by the typed-Config task.
data.title: rebar config / --show-config transparency command
